gitSafetyRules.description: Avoid committing API keys, passwords, tokens, or private credentials
Configure .gitignore to exclude sensitive files and dependencies
Always review changes before committing and pushing to remote
Write clear, descriptive commit messages for traceability
Enable branch protection on main/master to prevent direct pushes
Avoid committing large binary files; use LFS if needed
Use GPG signing for commit authentication
Scan repository for exposed secrets using tools like GitGuardian
